zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Marguerite Capet de Bourbon於1484年1月1日出生在英國坎布利其爾芬蘭區時，她的父親Louis II de Bourbon19歲，母親Marie de Brabant24歲。她和John Squire至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1567年6月2日在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾多丁頓享年83歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦藍白斯聖 瑪麗 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Marguerite Capet de Bourbon于1484年1月1日出生在英国坎布利其爾芬蘭區时，她的父亲Louis II de Bourbon19岁，母亲Marie de Brabant24岁。她和John Squire至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1567年6月2日在英国英格兰坎布利其爾多丁頓享年83岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦藍白斯聖 瑪麗 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Capet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Catalan and southern French: topographic name from canet (from Latin cannetum) ‘cane brake’, or a habitational name from Canet, the name of several places in Catalonia (Spain) and France, named with this word.
French: nickname meaning ‘little duck’ in Old French, perhaps applied to someone thought to resemble a duck in some way or to a dealer in poultry.

variants.name: Canete
meanings: Spanish (Cañete): habitational name (of the same etymology as Canet ) from any of the places called Cañete, especially Cañete de las Torres (Seville), Cañete la Real (Málaga) and Cañete (Cuenca).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourbon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from a village in Allier, the site of the (now ruined) castle of Bourbon, or from another place called (Le) Bourbon, mainly in the southern part of France. The placename is derived from a Celtic and pre-Celtic element borb- denoting a hot spring.

History: The progenitor of a large part of the American bearers of the surname Bourbon was Jean-Pierre Bourbon from Salins-les-Bains in Jura, France, who settled in MO in the middle of the 19th century. However, many bearers of the surname claim a connection with the house of Bourbon, which provided generations of monarchs of France and Spain and other European royalty. It takes its name from the castle of Bourbon in Allier, which was held by Adhémar, a 9th-century noble. His descendant Beatrice, heiress of Bourbon, married Robert of Clermont, 6th son of King Louis IX of France, in 1272, and these two are considered founders of the royal house. Robert's son Louis was created Duke of Bourbon in 1327. By the 16th century they had added much of southern France, the dukedom of Vendôme, and the kingdom of Navarre to their fiefs, and in 1589 a Bourbon succeeded to the throne of France as Henry IV. His grandson, Louis XIV, called ‘the Sun King’, reigned 1643–1715, presiding over a golden age of French literature and art and attempting to establish French supremacy in Europe. The Bourbons ruled France until the Revolution in 1793 and again 1815–48. The present claimants to the French throne are descended from Louis XIV's brother, Philippe, Duke of Orléans. The Bourbons acquired the Spanish throne in 1700, when a grandson of Louis XIV succeeded as Philip V; they ruled until 1931 and were restored, in the person of King Juan Carlos, in 1975. The Bourbon kings of the Two Sicilies (i.e. Sicily and Naples), 1759–1861, and Bourbon dukes of Parma, 1748–1860, were descended from the Spanish branch of the family.

variants.name: Borbon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Ana, Jesus, Marta, Miguel Angel, Tomas, Ademar, Alfredo, Ana Maria, Bernabe, Berta, Carlos.

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Marguerite Capet de Bourbon was born on 1 January 1484, in Fenland, Cambridgeshire, England, her father, Louis II de Bourbon, was 19 and her mother, Marie de Brabant, was 24. She had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with John Squire. She died on 2 June 1567, in Doddington, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 83, and was buried in Saint Mary Churchyard, Lambeth, London, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec John Squire. Elle est décédée le 2 juin 1567, à Doddington, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint Mary Churchyard, Lambeth, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Marguerite Capet de Bourbon(이)가 1484년 1월 1일 영국 캄브리지실르 펜랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Louis II de Bourbon(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie de Brabant(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 John Squire(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1567년 6월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 도딩턴에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 램스 세인트 메리 처르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Marguerite Capet de Bourbon родилась 1 января 1484 г. в местности фенланд, камбриджешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Louis II de Bourbon было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie de Brabant, 24. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от John Squire. Она умерла 2 июня 1567 г. в местности доддингтон, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 83 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт мэри чурчярд, лэмбет, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
